name: legisarc
description: Legislative Records Management & Public Transparency Platform — monorepo root

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d postgres && timeout /t 5 /nobreak >nul & npm run db:seed --prefix server
